title: EB and CC have updates - Update button, Release notes and Poly Lens links are available
scenario: Update button on device home screen navigates to Device Settings with Software Update tab expanded showing Charge Case update requiring Poly Lens Desktop
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. On the Home screen, ensure both the earbuds and the charge case have firmware updates available.
3. Observe the Home screen for the presence of an 'Update' button.
5. Verify that the app navigates to the Device Settings screen.
6. Confirm that the 'Software Update' tab is expanded automatically.
7. Under the Charge Case section, check for an 'Update Available' message.
8. Verify that the message includes information about needing Poly Lens Desktop.
9. Locate the release notes link for the earbuds and tap it to confirm it is functional.
10. Locate the Poly Lens App link for the charge case and tap it to confirm it is functional.
expected: The Update button is displayed on the Home screen. Tapping it navigates to Device Settings with the Software Update tab expanded. An "Update Available" message is shown under the Charge Case with info about needing Poly Lens Desktop. Release notes links (for earbuds) and a Poly Lens App link (for charge case) are present and functional.
